/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:VIOLATIONS #1, #2 AND #3 ADMITTED,/3000REIN/PAJ:130 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 14 DAYS, WITH TIME LOST,/4019HALF/RESTR/SA2:WILLIE SMITH AND WILLIAM HASKINS/SAORD3/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:DA MOTION TO DISMISS REMAINING ALLEGATIONS IS GRANTED,/CONTD:DA TO ISSUE PROTECTIVE ORDER AND SERVICE OF PROTECTIVE ORDER BY THE DEPUTY ON THE PAROLEE/DAW

/CAL:DA 3056 PTR/X:CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/X:JUDGE DORFMAN AND DEFENDANT AND PD FELDMAN IN THE COURTROOM/X:DA AND PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR VIA ZOOM//PDP/WIAPTR/X:PAROLEE DENIED VIOLATION & ENTERS NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS/X:PD'S ORAL REQUEST FOR RELEASE IS DENIED/NB/X:BAIL SET AT NO BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO APPEAR/
